chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, Bench at Sukkur C. P. No. D – 971 of 2021 Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objection 2.For orders on CMA 4524/2021 3.For hearing of Main Case. Date of Hearing: 01-11-2022 Date of Decision: 01-11-2022 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioners. O R D E R Through instant Constitution Petition, the Petitioners are seeking their employment in Respondents-Department on the basis of plot donation. While confronted as to the maintainability of instant petition in view of the dictum laid down by the Hon’ble Supreme Court vide Order dated 09.11.2015, passed in Civil Appeals No.19-K to 50-K of 2015 (Government of Sindh and others v. Loung Khan Rajper and others), whereby the controversy involved in this Petition has already been decided and it has been held that such appointments cannot be allowed on plot donation basis, learned counsel for the petitioners does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, the same stands dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
